notes: Runner configs for env-setup agents. The host program must substitute {placeholders} before execution.

placeholders.prompt_file: ABSOLUTE PATH to merged prompt text file
placeholders.report_schema_path: ABSOLUTE PATH to a JSON Schema file that matches report.json

argv: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export NEXAU_HOME="{nexau_home}"; export NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG="${{NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG:-{nexau_agent_config}}}"; export LLM_API_TYPE="${{LLM_API_TYPE:-anthropic_chat_completion}}"; export LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE="${{LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE:-anthropic}}"; "{nexau_python}" "{nexau_run_once_py}" 2>&1 | tee "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"

set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export NEXAU_HOME="{nexau_home}"; export NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG="${{NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG:-{nexau_deepseek31_agent_config}}}"; export LLM_API_TYPE="${{LLM_API_TYPE:-anthropic_chat_completion}}"; export LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE="${{LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE:-anthropic}}"; "{nexau_python}" "{nexau_run_once_py}" 2>&1 | tee "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"

set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export NEXAU_HOME="{nexau_home}"; export NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG="${{NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG:-{nexau_generic_agent_config}}}"; export LLM_API_TYPE="${{LLM_API_TYPE:-anthropic_chat_completion}}"; export LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE="${{LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE:-anthropic}}"; "{nexau_python}" "{nexau_run_once_py}" 2>&1 | tee "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"

set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export NEXAU_HOME="{nexau_home}"; export NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG="${{NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG:-{nexau_generic_agent_config}}}"; export LLM_API_TYPE="${{LLM_API_TYPE:-anthropic_chat_completion}}"; export LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE="${{LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE:-anthropic}}"; "{nexau_python}" "{nexau_run_once_py}" 2>&1 | tee "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"

set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export NEXAU_HOME="{nexau_home}"; export NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG="${{NEXAU_AGENT_CONFIG:-{nexau_generic_agent_config}}}"; export LLM_API_TYPE="${{LLM_API_TYPE:-anthropic_chat_completion}}"; export LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE="${{LLM_TOOL_CALL_MODE:-anthropic}}"; "{nexau_python}" "{nexau_run_once_py}" 2>&1 | tee "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"

set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export HOME=/tmp/codex_home; export XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/codex_xdg; mkdir -p "$HOME" "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME" "$HOME/.codex"; echo "[codex] whoami=$(whoami) HOME=$HOME"; ls -la /opt/host_codex_ro 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -d /opt/host_codex_ro ]; then cp -a /opt/host_codex_ro/. "$HOME/.codex/" || true; fi; if [ -d /opt/host_codex_xdg_ro ]; then mkdir -p "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/codex"; cp -a /opt/host_codex_xdg_ro/. "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/codex/" || true; fi; ls -la "$HOME/.codex" || true; if [ -z "${{OPENAI_BASE_URL:-}}" ] && [ -n "${{CODEX_BASE_URL:-}}" ]; then export OPENAI_BASE_URL="${{CODEX_BASE_URL}}"; fi; export OPENAI_BASE_URL="${{OPENAI_BASE_URL:-https://api.openai.com/v1}}"; if [ -z "${{OPENAI_API_KEY:-}}" ] && [ -n "${{CODEX_API_KEY:-}}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_KEY="${{CODEX_API_KEY}}"; fi; if [ -z "${{OPENAI_API_KEY:-}}" ] && [ -n "${{CODEX_TOKEN:-}}" ]; then export OPENAI_API_KEY="${{CODEX_TOKEN}}"; fi; if [ -z "${{OPENAI_API_KEY:-}}" ]; then echo "[codex] ERROR: OPENAI_API_KEY is not set" >&2; exit 2; fi; unset LLM_BASE_URL LLM_API_KEY SUMMARY_BASE_URL SUMMARY_API_KEY EXTRACT_BASE_URL EXTRACT_API_KEY; model_args=(); if [ -n "{codex_model}" ]; then model_args=(--model "{codex_model}"); fi; "{codex_bin}" --version; "{codex_bin}" exec "${{model_args[@]}}" --full-auto --skip-git-repo-check --sandbox workspace-write --output-schema "{report_schema_path}" --output-last-message "{report_path}" "$(cat "{prompt_file}")" 2>&1 | tee "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"

set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p "{out_dir}" "$(dirname "{report_path}")"; export HOME=/tmp/claude_home; export XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/claude_xdg; export CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR="$HOME"; mkdir -p "$HOME" "$XDG_CONFIG_HOME" "$HOME/.claude"; bash "{runner_dir}/bin/run_claude_print_json.sh" "{repo_root}" "{prompt_file}" "{claude_model}" "{report_schema_path}" 2> "{out_dir}/agent_log.txt"
